title: carya tomentosa f. ovoidea
intro: Carya tomentosa f. ovoidea, also known as a cultivar of the hickory tree, is a type of deciduous tree native to North America, characterized by its broad, rounded crown and pinnate leaves. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Carya tomentosa f. ovoidea include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an antimicrobial agent, among others. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the tree can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
